description: CompositionWhite kurta made of 100% cotton, with a double V-neck, hakoba stitch detailing at the A-line waist and chest, small pintucks along the front chest and back centre chest, larger pintucks on the side lengths of the kurta, has three-quarter sleeves and split side hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this white kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in its stylish print, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
